SEARCH
Package com.example.helios.data

Class FirebaseRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.helios.data.FirebaseRepository
public class FirebaseRepository extends Object
Repository class responsible for interacting with Firebase Firestore. (Handles CRUD operations for users, events, and waiting lists.) This repository is responsible for Firestore reads and writes for users, events, waiting-list entries, and admin-device checks. Role: repository/data-access layer used by service classes. Outstanding issues: validation rules are intentionally minimal, several methods are direct pass-throughs, and the class directly constructs FirebaseFirestore which limits testability.

    Description

    Initializes the FirebaseRepository with a Firestore instance.

    deleteUser(String uid, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
    Deletes a user profile from Firestore by UID.

    deleteWaitingListEntry(String eventId, String entrantUid, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
    Removes a user from an event's waiting list.

    Retrieves all events from Firestore, ordered by start time.

    Retrieves all user profiles from Firestore.

    Retrieves all waiting list entries for a given event.

    Retrieves a single event by its ID.

    Retrieves a user profile from Firestore by UID.

    getWaitingListEntry(String eventId, String entrantUid, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<WaitingListEntry> onSuccess, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
    Retrieves a specific waiting list entry for a user and event.

  • Constructor Details

    • FirebaseRepository

      public FirebaseRepository()
      Initializes the FirebaseRepository with a Firestore instance.

  • Method Details

    • saveUser

      public void saveUser(@NonNull UserProfile user, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Saves a user profile to Firestore.
      Parameters:
      user - The user profile to save.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • updateUser

      public void updateUser(@NonNull UserProfile user, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Updates an existing user profile in Firestore.
      Parameters:
      user - The updated user profile.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getUser

      public void getUser(@NonNull String uid, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfile> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves a user profile from Firestore by UID.
      Parameters:
      uid - The unique identifier of the user.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the UserProfile (null if not found).
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • deleteUser

      public void deleteUser(@NonNull String uid, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Deletes a user profile from Firestore by UID.
      Parameters:
      uid - The unique identifier of the user.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • muteNotifications

      public void muteNotifications(@NonNull String uid, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Disables notifications for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      uid - The unique identifier of the user.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • isAdminInstallation

      public void isAdminInstallation(@NonNull String installationId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Boolean> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Checks if a device installation ID is registered as an admin device and is enabled.
      Parameters:
      installationId - The device's installation ID.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving true if the device is an enabled admin.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getAllEvents

      public void getAllEvents(@NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<Event>> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves all events from Firestore, ordered by start time.
      Parameters:
      onSuccess - Callback receiving a list of all events.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getEventById

      public void getEventById(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Event> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves a single event by its ID.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier of the event.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the event (null if not found).
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • saveEvent

      public void saveEvent(@NonNull Event event, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Saves or updates an event in Firestore. If the event has no ID, a new document is created and the ID is updated.
      Parameters:
      event - The event to save.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • deleteEvent

      public void deleteEvent(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Deletes an event from Firestore by its ID.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier of the event.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

      public void getAllUsers(@NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<UserProfile>> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves all user profiles from Firestore.
      Parameters:
      onSuccess - Callback receiving a list of all user profiles.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getWaitingListEntry

      public void getWaitingListEntry(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String entrantUid, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<WaitingListEntry> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves a specific waiting list entry for a user and event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event.
      entrantUid - The UID of the entrant.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the WaitingListEntry (null if not found).
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • upsertWaitingListEntry

      public void upsertWaitingListEntry(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String entrantUid, @NonNull WaitingListEntry entry, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Adds or updates a waiting list entry.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event.
      entrantUid - The UID of the entrant.
      entry - The entry data to save.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getAllWaitingListEntries

      public void getAllWaitingListEntries(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<WaitingListEntry>> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves all waiting list entries for a given event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving a list of all waiting list entries.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • updateWaitingListEntry

      public void updateWaitingListEntry(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String entrantUid, @NonNull WaitingListEntry entry, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Updates an existing waiting list entry.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event.
      entrantUid - The UID of the entrant.
      entry - The updated entry data.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

      entrantUid - The UID of the entrant.

      Seeds a demo event into Firestore for testing purposes.
      Parameters:
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • setNotificationsMuted

      public void setNotificationsMuted(@NonNull String uid, boolean muted, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Updates the notification mute status for a user.
      Parameters:
      uid - The unique identifier of the user.
      muted - True to mute notifications, false to enable.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.
